  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The core request is to reformulate the paper's high-level narrative and contribution claims.",
    "R1.5": "A new conceptual story will likely require reorganizing the section-level narrative arc to match.",
    "RX.1": "The reframed narrative must transparently disclose the uncertainties and limitations of the underlying research.",
    "RX.2": "The new conceptual framing must avoid exaggerating the importance or generalizability of the findings.",
    "RX.3": "The proposed story must remain faithful to the scope of the empirical work described in the artifact.",
    "RX.4": "The revised framing must consider and mitigate potential negative consequences, such as for crowdworkers.",
    "RX.5": "The process of reframing the narrative must be documented to ensure traceability of the changes."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The core request is to reformulate the paper's high-level narrative and contribution claims.
rationale.R1.5: A new conceptual story will likely require reorganizing the section-level narrative arc to match.
rationale.RX.1: The reframed narrative must transparently disclose the uncertainties and limitations of the underlying research.
rationale.RX.2: The new conceptual framing must avoid exaggerating the importance or generalizability of the findings.
rationale.RX.3: The proposed story must remain faithful to the scope of the empirical work described in the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The revised framing must consider and mitigate potential negative consequences, such as for crowdworkers.
rationale.RX.5: The process of reframing the narrative must be documented to ensure traceability of the changes.
